title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: SWEGLE BRANCH HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of sports and fitness programs, including team sports such as basketball and soccer. Snacks, meals, and nutrition education are also provided. 1711 Aguilas Court NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Grades 1-12 Hours: Varies Email (503) 391-1519 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 391-1519 Main phone (503) 339-7565 Teen Center phone Main phone (503) 391-1519 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $15 membership fee annually (youth); $5 membership fee annually (teens); members are able to attend any club or branch in the area DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: East of Lancaster on Market. Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
